rationale: Acting on Review 2 yields the better PR: its first finding correctly identifies the non-idiomatic 4-line rw-based proof of isUnipotent_one (verifiable at lines 54-58 of the diff) that can be reduced to a single simp, and its second correctly flags the dead, content-free theorem at line 73 that merely echoes a : True class field. Review 1's approve leaves both issues unaddressed.
